treatment_information.specific_treatment: ligation of left brachiocephalic AV fistula branches

treatment_timeline.event: Patient presented to ER with dyspnea and was admitted with uremia and CHF.
R IJ tunneled HD catheter placed.
Fistulagram demonstrated multiple cephalic-basilic vein collaterals.
Surgery performed to ligate left brachiocephalic AV fistula branches.

patient_outcome.final_status: Mental status clear and coherent; ambulatory - independent.
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow-up with surgeon and Primary Care Provider (PCP) as advised.
